concept.title: Non-CDS Users
concept.shortdesc: Users without a CDS or CDS Manager role are categorized under a ‘Non-CDS user’ category that displays the count of reviews performed by this user in the CDE One reports. For example, CDS column in the CDS Review Activity report displays the ‘Non-CDS user’ and the count of reviews performed by the Non-CDS user.

fig.title: Non CDS Users - CDS Review Activity
